/usr/bin/c++  -O2   CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/graph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/bfs_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/bfs_gpu_naive.cu.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/bfs_gpu_shared.cu.o  -o main   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
